mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO version_diffs (file_id, from_version_id, to_version_id, diff_method, added_lines, deleted_lines, summary, hunks_json, created_at) VALUES (#{fileId}, #{fromVersionId}, #{toVersionId}, #{diffMethod}, #{addedLines}, #{deletedLines}, #{summary}, #{hunksJson}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT diff_method AS diffMethod, added_lines AS addedLines, deleted_lines AS deletedLines, summary, hunks_json AS hunksJson, created_at AS createdAt FROM version_diffs WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND from_version_id = #{fromVersionId} AND to_version_id = #{toVersionId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO version_diffs (file_id, from_version_id, to_version_id, diff_method, added_lines, deleted_lines, summary, hunks_json, status, attempts, last_error, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{fileId}, #{fromVersionId}, #{toVersionId}, NULL, 0, 0, NULL, NULL, 'PENDING', 0, NULL, #{now}, #{now})
mapper.select: SELECT id, status, diff_method AS diffMethod, added_lines AS addedLines, deleted_lines AS deletedLines, summary, hunks_json AS hunksJson, attempts, last_error AS lastError, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM version_diffs WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND from_version_id = #{fromVersionId} AND to_version_id = #{toVersionId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, file_id AS fileId, from_version_id AS fromVersionId, to_version_id AS toVersionId, attempts FROM version_diffs WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE version_diffs SET status = 'COMPLETED', diff_method = #{diffMethod}, added_lines = #{addedLines}, deleted_lines = #{deletedLines}, summary = #{summary}, hunks_json = #{hunksJson}, last_error = NULL, updated_at = #{now} WHERE id = #{id}
